Vendored dependency: Pico-PIO-USB

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/sekigon-gonnoc/Pico-PIO-USB

Vendored from tag:
0.7.1

Purpose in this project:
- RP2040 PIO-based USB host support used by arpnmidi.txt for USB MIDI hosting.

Attribution:
- Original authors and license are preserved in this vendored directory.
- See LICENSE in this folder for the upstream license text.
